title: NVIDIA — home
tagline: Brand-faithful Mode A refresh of nvidia.com/en-us/. Type and palette pinned to the captured surface; improvements target structural gaps (semantic landmarks, modular type scale, CTA verb consolidation, hero overload, mega-menu bloat).

direction.phrase: follow the current NVIDIA design and apply improvements that preserve the current design principles
movements: brand-faithful: palette + type pinned to captured surface
audience: 5 tracks preserved (gamer / enterprise / developer / creator / industry-buyer)
mega-menu: eager render → lazy-load on hover (~85% smaller initial payload)
hero: 8-slide auto-rotating carousel → 1 anchor slide + 4-tile rail

palette.name: NVIDIA brand-pinned
brandFaithfulInversions: saturated NVIDIA green #76b900 retained as single CTA accent

originalCritique: The brand surface is genuinely distinctive — sharp 0px corners, single-accent NVIDIA green, two-surface dark/light alternation, sentence-case headings, proper-noun product naming. But the captured home runs an 8-slide auto-rotating hero where every slide claims lead-story status; the page H1 is a hidden 15px scaffold while the visible 48px headline is an H2; 0 <main> and 0 <footer> landmarks; 9 distinct CTA verbs across one page (six clustering in the same see-more bucket); and a 440-card mega-menu eager-rendered into every page's initial HTML (~85% of paint-blocking DOM is hidden navigation).

variants.name: Brand-faithful refresh
variants.thesis: Same brand surface verbatim — palette pinned, type pinned, sharp corners, green as the single accent. The page just gets the structural and accessibility floor it was missing: real landmarks, single visible H1, one anchor + 4-tile hero rail instead of 8-slide carousel, 8-verb CTA closed list, lazy-loaded mega-menu.
variants.fix: Structural floor — wrap content in <main>, footer in <footer>, single visible H1 per page (the carousel headline becomes H1; the hidden 15px scaffold is removed). Hero rest — 8-slide auto-rotating carousel becomes 1 anchor slide + 4-tile 'more from NVIDIA' rail; no auto-rotation (also fixes WCAG 2.2.2). Voice consolidation — 9 CTA verbs on one page collapsed to the canonical 8-verb taxonomy (Try Now, Learn More, See Buying Options, Subscribe, Get Started, Talk to an Expert, Contact, Play). Mega-menu lazy-load — initial HTML ships only the 5 tab labels + skeleton; tile content loads on hover from a static JSON. ~85% smaller initial DOM.
